---
name: report-converter
description: Convert a raw report into the house format. Use when the user asks to "convert this report" or "apply the house style to this document".
---

# Report Converter

Apply the house formatting rules to an input report.

Run the converter described in [the converter guide](./references/converter.md) and
follow [the style rules](./references/style.md).

## Steps

1. Load the input.
2. Apply the transformations.
3. Emit the formatted output.
